subcodes.first_line: O ye handmaids of the Merciful! The school for girls taketh precedence over the school for boys, for it is incumbent upon the girls of this glorious era
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اماء رحمن مدرسه بنات اهم از مدرسه ذکور است زیرا دوشیزگان این قرن مجید باید
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @praise and encouragement, @importance of community building, @parents and children; youth; families
